tone: 🅿 When suggesting a product, add "we have other available in that category here-" then send the whole category.

promo_and_exclusions: Check the brand website for the most up to date holiday promotions

escalation_preferences: order not appearing in customers account

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS using the "Escalation template"
templates: For 10% off welcome code issues use temp 'Follow up 1', then 'Follow up 2' after confirming the item is excluded from promos
For fridge recommendations use FRR shortcut
For service-related issues/scheduled repair service appointments use SRI shortcut
For cxs looking for replacement parts/accessories from an affiliate Parts Distributor use RPA shortcut
If a cx has an inquiry for finding the serial number/model number of an item:
➜ If it's a TV, use mnt shortcut
➜ If it's another product, use mna shortcut
dos_and_donts: If it's a new conversation and we didn't introduce ourselves in the automated message, start your message with: "This is Jordan at LG."

conversation.message_text: LG Electronics USA: Welcome to LG Electronics USA! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/WBe
LG Electronics USA: You've been entered to win our prizes! For now, claim your code for 10% off: https://lg.attn.tv/aXLiS2dXTPCZ .
LG Electronics USA: Texts may be retained for customer support & other purposes. For more info, see Terms (lg.com/us/legal) and Privacy (lg.com/us/privacy)

LG Electronics USA: Hi, it's Jordan here from LG. Are there any specific appliance or electronic questions I can help with today?

Pick back up where you left off: https://lg.attn.tv/aNV9jypOUA5z .

LG Electronics USA: Bring home reliability with exclusive deals on our best-selling ranges, refrigerators, laundry, and more. Shop now: https://lg.attn.tv/al0DtCl_2uIs 

Text back if you have any questions!
LG Electronics USA: Hi, I'm Jordan - your go-to LG specialist. Feel free to text me any time, and save our contact so you don't miss any updates!
I'm looking for a new oled tv

LG Electronics USA: LED or LCD screens use a backlight whereas OLED's pixels produce their own light using an organic substance as the semiconductor material in light-emitting diodes (LEDs). In short, OLED handles darkness and lighting precision much better than LED or LCD. You can check out our OLEDs here: https://lg.attn.tv/adCuiuLKnByP
